check_ongoing_interval.description: When true, evaluate the current (still incomplete) time interval in addition to completed ones.

series_index.description: Zero-based index of the series in the insight's query to monitor.

column.description: Name of the result column to evaluate. When unset, the single numeric column is used (an error if the result has more than one numeric column).

evaluation.description: How to read the result rows — an explicit choice, no implicit default.

label_column.description: Column whose value labels the evaluated row(s) in breach messages: every row in `any_row` mode, or the single evaluated row in `last_row`/`first_row`. When unset, the first non-evaluated column is used, falling back to the row number (any_row) or the value column name (last_row/first_row).

check_ongoing_interval.description: When true, evaluate the current (still in-progress) period; by default only completed periods are used.

funnel_step.description: Zero-based step index to evaluate. Null = the last step (overall conversion).

anyOf.description:
Per-insight-kind alert config, discriminated by ``type`` — keeps the OpenAPI (and the
generated frontend types and MCP tool schemas) in sync with every kind alerts support.

config.description: Per-insight-kind alert config. For SQL insights, selects the evaluated column and read direction (last_row/first_row) so the preview matches the alert; ignored for trends.

date_from.description: Relative date string for how far back to simulate (e.g. '-24h', '-30d', '-4w'). If not provided, uses the detector's minimum required samples. Trends insights only — a SQL query's own rows are the series.

diffs_n.description: Order of differencing. 0 = raw values, 1 = first-order diffs (default: 0)

lags_n.description: Number of lag features. 0 = none, >0 = include n lagged values (default: 0)

smooth_n.description: Moving average window size. 0 = no smoothing, >1 = smooth over n points (default: 0)

threshold.description: Anomaly probability threshold [0-1]. Points above this probability are flagged (default: 0.9)

window.description: Rolling window size for calculating mean/std (default: 30)

window.description: Rolling window size for calculating median/MAD (default: 30)

multiplier.description: IQR multiplier for fence calculation (default: 1.5, use 3.0 for far outliers)

window.description: Rolling window size for calculating quartiles (default: 30)

lower_bound.description: Lower bound - values below this are anomalies
